ptxt.intxrefpoff: Front Brake Pad Removal and Installation

attention4.ptxt: If the front brake pad lining is polished with sandpaper, abrading particles will be embedded in the lining and will damage the front brake disc.
Do not polish a rough pad lining with sandpaper. Replace the front brake pad with a new one.

item.ptxt: Check for leakage of brake fluid when removing front brake pads and repair front brake caliper if leakage is found.
Replace all brake pads at the same time even if only one pad is defective.
Check thickness of each front brake pad lining. If any lining is thinner than limit or is excessively worn on one side, replace all front brake pads.
